recommendations.title: Enormous
recommendations.overview: It takes him suddenly at 40 years: Frédéric wants a baby, Claire never wanted one and they agreed on that. He commits the unforgivable and makes a child behind her back. Claire turns into a whale and Frédéric becomes a doting father.

recommendations.title: Haunted Mansion
recommendations.overview: A woman and her son enlist a motley crew of so-called spiritual experts to help rid their home of supernatural squatters.

recommendations.title: Code 3
recommendations.overview: A burned-out paramedic tries to survive his last 24 hours on the job while training a new recruit.

recommendations.title: They Will Kill You
recommendations.overview: A woman answers a help wanted ad to be a housekeeper in a mysterious New York City high-rise, unaware that she is entering a community that has seen a number of disappearances over the years and may be under the grip of a Satanic cult.
